name: Paw Performance Polo-Small Men Blue
shortDescription: Keep it cool and meaningful with this men’s small-fit polo in a classic blue hue. Designed for comfort and style, it features a soft cotton-poly blend and a subtle embroidered paw print that combines cat and dog paws — perfect for the modern pet-loving man.
description: Keep it cool and meaningful with this men’s small-fit polo in a classic blue hue. Designed for comfort and style, it features a soft cotton-poly blend and a subtle embroidered paw print that combines cat and dog paws — perfect for the modern pet-loving man. Size: Small (Men’s Fit) Color: Blue Material: Soft, breathable cotton-poly blend Design: Embroidered paw print symbolizing both cats and dogs Fit: Tailored small men’s fit with a structured collar and two-button placket Care: Machine washable for easy wear and care Ideal for everyday wear, casual outings, or walking your four-legged best friend — this shirt is made for proud pet dads.
